name: chr18p_telomere
description: p-arm telomere of chr18. TTAGGG hexameric tandem repeat (reverse-complement CCCTAA on the C-strand) extending several kb inward from the chromosome end. Subtelomeric DNA immediately interior contains TAR1 and degenerate telomere-like variants. In GRCh38 this region is represented by a 10 kb telomere gap interval (N-stretch) at the 5' end of the chromosome; T2T-CHM13 resolves the actual TTAGGG array length (typically 2-15 kb).
expected_copy_count: 300-2500 tandem TTAGGG hexamers (~2-15 kb of array) per chromosome end; declines with age and proliferation
